data.body: VersionBadge currently renders the update CTA as 'Update now to v', but release tags come from GitHub tag_name and may already include a leading 'v', producing labels like 'vv0.6.2'. Expected outcome: normalize display so the badge/popover shows a single version prefix consistently. Relevant context: src/components/version-badge.tsx hardcodes a 'v' prefix while src/lib/release-version.ts preserves the release tag verbatim. Also assess whether the update CTA should remain clipboard-only or grow a backend-triggered update/restart flow; current implementation only copies 'foolery update' and does not invoke any server-side update path.
data.title: Fix version badge double-v label
